SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory

Class DuckMemory

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory.DuckMemory
public class DuckMemory extends Object
Represents the Game Boy memory map used by the emulator.

Cartridge ROM and external RAM are routed through the active mapper, while working RAM, echo RAM, DMA, timers, audio, and I/O registers remain under the usual CPU-visible rules. In CGB mode, the memory map also exposes VRAM bank switching, WRAM bank switching, palette RAM, and the extra boot ROM layout used by the color models.

    Creates an empty memory map with no cartridge attached.

    Captures the mutable memory, mapper, DMA, and palette state.

    Handles the CGB speed-switch side effects of the STOP instruction.

    Returns whether the active cartridge exposes battery-backed save data.

    Seeds the CGB post-boot hardware state when the boot ROM is skipped.

    Seeds the DMG post-boot hardware register state when the boot ROM is skipped.

    Returns whether the active hardware mode is CGB.

    Loads a cartridge and clears the non-cartridge memory map.

    Loads a cartridge and clears the non-cartridge memory map using the requested hardware mode for compatible cartridges.

    Reads a continuous block of bytes.

    Returns one CGB background palette colour as packed ARGB.
    int
    ReadCgbObjectPaletteColourRgb(int paletteIndex, int colourIndex)
    Returns one CGB object palette colour as packed ARGB.
    int

    Reads from a specific VRAM bank regardless of the currently selected bank.
    void

    Restores the mutable memory, mapper, DMA, and palette state.
    void
    SetApu(DuckAPU apu)
    Attaches the audio unit and mirrors the master control register.
    void
    SetCpu(DuckCPU cpu)
    Attaches the CPU to memory for stack and interrupt side effects.
    void
    SetDividerFromTimer(int value)
    Mirrors the timer's divider output into memory.
    void
    SetJoypad(DuckJoypad joypad)
    Attaches the joypad peripheral and mirrors its current register state.
    void
    SetTimaFromTimer(int value)
    Mirrors the timer's TIMA output into memory.
    void
    SetTimer(DuckTimer timer)
    Attaches the timer peripheral to memory.
    int
    StackPopByte()
    Pops one byte from the emulated stack.
    int
    StackPopShort()
    Pops a 16-bit value from the emulated stack.
    void
    StackPushByte(int value)
    Pushes one byte on to the emulated stack.
    void
    StackPushShort(int value)
    Pushes a 16-bit value on to the emulated stack.
    void
    TickDma()
    Advances the DMA engine by one host tick.
    void
    Write(int address, int value)
    Writes a byte to the memory map, applying register and peripheral side effects where needed.
    void
    WriteDirect(int address, int value)
    Writes straight to the memory backing store without applying CPU-visible register side effects.

  • Constructor Details

    • DuckMemory

      public DuckMemory()
      Creates an empty memory map with no cartridge attached.

  • Method Details

    • SetTimer

      public void SetTimer(DuckTimer timer)
      Attaches the timer peripheral to memory.
      Parameters:
      timer - timer instance

    • SetCpu

      public void SetCpu(DuckCPU cpu)
      Attaches the CPU to memory for stack and interrupt side effects.
      Parameters:
      cpu - CPU instance

    • SetJoypad

      public void SetJoypad(DuckJoypad joypad)
      Attaches the joypad peripheral and mirrors its current register state.
      Parameters:
      joypad - joypad instance

    • SetApu

      public void SetApu(DuckAPU apu)
      Attaches the audio unit and mirrors the master control register.
      Parameters:
      apu - audio unit

    • LoadRom

      public void LoadRom(ROM rom)
      Loads a cartridge and clears the non-cartridge memory map.
      Parameters:
      rom - cartridge image to attach

    • LoadRom

      public void LoadRom(ROM rom, boolean useCgbMode)
      Loads a cartridge and clears the non-cartridge memory map using the requested hardware mode for compatible cartridges.
      Parameters:
      rom - cartridge image to attach
      useCgbMode - whether to enable CGB hardware when the cartridge allows it

    • LoadBootRom

      public void LoadBootRom(byte[] bootRomBytes)
      Loads a DMG or CGB boot ROM and maps it over cartridge ROM.
      Parameters:
      bootRomBytes - boot ROM bytes

    • LoadBootRom

      public void LoadBootRom(byte[] bootRomBytes, boolean isCgbBootRom)
      Loads a boot ROM and maps it over cartridge ROM.
      Parameters:
      bootRomBytes - boot ROM bytes
      isCgbBootRom - whether the boot ROM uses the CGB split mapping

    • InitialiseDmgBootState

      public void InitialiseDmgBootState()
      Seeds the DMG post-boot hardware register state when the boot ROM is skipped.

    • InitialiseCgbBootState

      public void InitialiseCgbBootState()
      Seeds the CGB post-boot hardware state when the boot ROM is skipped.

    • WriteDirect

      public void WriteDirect(int address, int value)
      Writes straight to the memory backing store without applying CPU-visible register side effects.
      Parameters:
      address - address to write
      value - byte value to store

    • Read

      public int Read(int address)
      Reads a byte from the memory map.
      Parameters:
      address - CPU address to read
      Returns:
      byte value visible to the CPU

    • Write

      public void Write(int address, int value)
      Writes a byte to the memory map, applying register and peripheral side effects where needed.
      Parameters:
      address - CPU address to write
      value - byte value to store

    • TickDma

      public void TickDma()
      Advances the DMA engine by one host tick.

    • HasSaveData

      public boolean HasSaveData()
      Returns whether the active cartridge exposes battery-backed save data.
      Returns:
      true when save RAM should be persisted

    • ExportSaveData

      public byte[] ExportSaveData()
      Exports the raw cartridge save RAM.
      Returns:
      raw save bytes

    • IsLoadedRomCgbCompatible

      public boolean IsLoadedRomCgbCompatible()
      Returns whether the currently loaded ROM advertises Game Boy Color compatibility.
      Returns:
      true when the loaded cartridge is CGB capable

    • IsCgbMode

      public boolean IsCgbMode()
      Returns whether the active hardware mode is CGB.
      Returns:
      true when CGB-only features are enabled

    • LoadSaveData

      public void LoadSaveData(byte[] saveData)
      Loads raw cartridge save RAM into the active mapper.
      Parameters:
      saveData - raw save bytes

    • ReadBytes

      public int[] ReadBytes(int start, int count)
      Reads a continuous block of bytes.
      Parameters:
      start - first address to read
      count - number of bytes to read
      Returns:
      copied byte block

    • StackPushByte

      public void StackPushByte(int value)
      Pushes one byte on to the emulated stack.
      Parameters:
      value - byte value to push

    • StackPushShort

      public void StackPushShort(int value)
      Pushes a 16-bit value on to the emulated stack.
      Parameters:
      value - 16-bit value to push

    • StackPopByte

      public int StackPopByte()
      Pops one byte from the emulated stack.
      Returns:
      popped byte

    • StackPopShort

      public int StackPopShort()
      Pops a 16-bit value from the emulated stack.
      Returns:
      popped 16-bit value

    • SetDividerFromTimer

      public void SetDividerFromTimer(int value)
      Mirrors the timer's divider output into memory.
      Parameters:
      value - divider register value

    • SetTimaFromTimer

      public void SetTimaFromTimer(int value)
      Mirrors the timer's TIMA output into memory.
      Parameters:
      value - TIMA register value

    • ReadVideoRam

      public int ReadVideoRam(int bank, int address)
      Reads from a specific VRAM bank regardless of the currently selected bank.
      Parameters:
      bank - VRAM bank index
      address - VRAM address from 0x8000 to 0x9FFF
      Returns:
      byte value from the requested VRAM bank

    • ReadCgbBackgroundPaletteColourRgb

      public int ReadCgbBackgroundPaletteColourRgb(int paletteIndex, int colourIndex)
      Returns one CGB background palette colour as packed ARGB.
      Parameters:
      paletteIndex - palette index from 0 to 7
      colourIndex - palette colour index from 0 to 3
      Returns:
      packed ARGB value

    • ReadCgbObjectPaletteColourRgb

      public int ReadCgbObjectPaletteColourRgb(int paletteIndex, int colourIndex)
      Returns one CGB object palette colour as packed ARGB.
      Parameters:
      paletteIndex - palette index from 0 to 7
      colourIndex - palette colour index from 0 to 3
      Returns:
      packed ARGB value

    • HandleStopInstruction

      public void HandleStopInstruction()
      Handles the CGB speed-switch side effects of the STOP instruction.

    • CaptureState

      public DuckMemory.MemoryState CaptureState()
      Captures the mutable memory, mapper, DMA, and palette state.
      Returns:
      memory state snapshot

    • RestoreState

      public void RestoreState(DuckMemory.MemoryState state)
      Restores the mutable memory, mapper, DMA, and palette state.
      Parameters:
      state - memory snapshot to restore
